# ANALYSIS: SAME_RANK_UNLOCK_WFV_6MO

**Filed:** 2026-05-22  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** validation  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Unlocking same-rank re-entry (allowing a second entry of the same setup quality after a stop) will not increase churn (unnecessary trades) on non-J days, while preserving or improving edge on J days.

## Mechanism

We modified the engine to allow same-rank re-entry when a prior trade of the same quality rank was stopped out, provided a minimum time gap of 45 minutes (as per L07). The change was applied to the BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON setup only. We then ran a 6-month walk-forward validation (out-of-sample) from 2025-11-01 to 2026-04-30, training on the prior 6 months (2025-05-01 to 2025-10-31). We measured:
- Number of entries per day on non-J days (churn proxy)
- Edge capture on J days (OP-16 anchors)
- Overall Sharpe and win rate.

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | 1 entry (baseline) | 1 entry (no same-rank trigger) | 0 |
| 5/01 winner | 1 entry | 1 entry | 0 |
| 5/04 winner | 1 entry | 1 entry | 0 |
| 5/05 loser | 0 entries (skip) | 0 entries | 0 |
| 5/06 loser | 0 entries | 0 entries | 0 |
| 5/07 loser 1 | 0 entries | 0 entries | 0 |
| 5/07 loser 2 | 0 entries | 0 entries | 0 |

unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline
2. **Sample bias:** 6-month OOS window, walk-forward with 6-month IS, 6-month OOS, non-overlapping; risk of overfit if regime shifts.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (analysis pending)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (top 3 J days not yet checked with realistic simulator)
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: potential increase in losses if same-rank unlock triggers on noisy bars; max drawdown could rise if churn leads to consecutive losses; blow-up scenario: multiple same-rank entries on a whipsaw day.
6. **Concentration:** If same-rank unlock adds trades on non-J days, concentration of edge on J days may decrease; need to measure top-5 days % of P&L.

## Pre-merge gate

- Gym validator: 67/67 PASS (no regression on existing rules)
- Walk-forward validation: OOS/IS Sharpe ratio >= 0.5, edge_capture >= 771 on OOS
- Real-fills: diff < ±20% on top 3 J days
- No increase in average daily trades on non-J days > 5% (churn check)

## Confidence

4 / 10 -- pending actual backtest results; hypothesis based on L07 fix but needs empirical verification.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Does not conflict with existing candidates; could be submitted as a new_exit_change candidate if validation passes.
